name: IR

values.name: andMap
values.type: (input -> field) -> IR.Codec field field -> IR.Codec input (field -> output) -> IR.Codec input output

values.name: andThen
values.type: (output1 -> Result.Result IR.Error output2) -> IR.Codec input output1 -> IR.Codec input output2

values.name: array
values.type: IR.Codec a a -> IR.Codec (Array.Array a) (Array.Array a)

values.name: bool
values.type: IR.Codec Basics.Bool Basics.Bool

values.name: char
values.type: IR.Codec Char.Char Char.Char

values.name: contramap
values.type: (input2 -> input1) -> IR.Codec input1 output -> IR.Codec input2 output

values.name: custom
values.type: input -> IR.CustomCodec input Basics.Never output

values.name: dict
values.type: IR.Codec comparable comparable -> IR.Codec v v -> IR.Codec (Dict.Dict comparable v) (Dict.Dict comparable v)

values.name: endCustom
values.type: IR.CustomCodec (a -> IR.IR) () a -> IR.Codec a a

values.name: float
values.type: IR.Codec Basics.Float Basics.Float

values.name: fromInput
values.type: IR.Codec input output -> input -> IR.IR

values.name: int
values.type: IR.Codec Basics.Int Basics.Int

values.name: irType
values.type: IR.Codec input output -> IR.IRType

values.name: list
values.type: IR.Codec input output -> IR.Codec (List.List input) (List.List output)

values.name: map
values.type: (output1 -> output2) -> IR.Codec input output1 -> IR.Codec input output2

values.name: maybe
values.type: IR.Codec a a -> IR.Codec (Maybe.Maybe a) (Maybe.Maybe a)

values.name: result
values.type: IR.Codec x x -> IR.Codec a a -> IR.Codec (Result.Result x a) (Result.Result x a)

values.name: string
values.type: IR.Codec String.String String.String

values.name: succeed
values.type: output -> IR.Codec input output

values.name: toOutput
values.type: IR.Codec input output -> IR.IR -> Result.Result IR.Error output

values.name: triple
values.type: IR.Codec a a -> IR.Codec b b -> IR.Codec c c -> IR.Codec ( a, b, c ) ( a, b, c )

values.name: tuple
values.type: IR.Codec a a -> IR.Codec b b -> IR.Codec ( a, b ) ( a, b )

values.name: variant0
values.type: output -> IR.CustomCodec (IR.IR -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodec input () output

values.name: variant1
values.type: (arg1 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 arg1 -> IR.CustomCodec ((arg1 -> IR.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodec input () output

values.name: variant2
values.type: (arg1 -> arg2 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 arg1 -> IR.Codec arg2 arg2 -> IR.CustomCodec ((arg1 -> arg2 -> IR.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodec input () output
